zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton於1340年出生在英國賀福爾賀福德時，他的父親Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton29歲，母親Maud de Botetourt25歲。他於大約1377年與Elizabeth Talbot結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1396年4月22日在英國英格蘭賀福爾維爾頓享年56歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾賀福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton于1340年出生在英国賀福爾賀福德时，他的父亲Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton29岁，母亲Maud de Botetourt25岁。他于大约1377年与Elizabeth Talbot结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1396年4月22日在英国英格兰賀福爾維爾頓享年56岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾賀福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton was born in 1340, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, his father, Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton, was 29 and his mother, Maud de Botetourt, was 25. He married Elizabeth Talbot about 1377. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 22 April 1396, in Wilton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Hereford, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton est né en 1340, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Maud de Botetourt, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Talbot environ 1377. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 avril 1396, à Wilton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton 1340 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton 29 und seine Mutter Maud de Botetourt 25. Er hat um 1377 Elizabeth Talbot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. April 1396 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Wilton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hereford, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton è nato il nel 1340 nel Hereford, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Botetourt, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Talbot circa 1377. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 aprile 1396, nel Wilton, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Hereford, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wiltonが1340年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで生まれた時，父Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wiltonは29歳，母Maud de Botetourtは25歳であった。約1377年にElizabeth Talbotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1396年4月22日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィルトンで56歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton(이)가 1340년 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Botetourt(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1377년 Elizabeth Talbot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1396년 4월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 윌턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton nasceu em 1340, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Botetourt, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Talbot aproximadamente 1377. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de abril de 1396, em Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton родился в 1340 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Botetourt, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Talbot около 1377 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 апреля 1396 г. в местности уилтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton nació en 1340, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Maud de Botetourt, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Talbot aproximadamente 1377. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de abril de 1396, en Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
